results.name: oh yeah!
results.description: Bursting out of the wall like the Kool-Aid man.

results.name: oil painting (medium)
results.description: Magic card art that was rendered as an oil painting.

results.name: oil resisting adapation
results.description: Blue crystals that creatures on Ikoria gained to resist the phyrexian oil

results.name: ojutai symbol
results.description: Ojutai's eye.

results.name: old banish templating
results.description: Banish effects in which the "exile" and "return" effects are separate linked abilities.

results.name: old blocking deathtouch
results.description: Before the keyword was made evergreen in Magic 2010, deathtouch was sometimes a triggered ability based on blocking. See also [old damage deathtouch](old-damage-deathtouch).

results.name: old damage deathtouch
results.description: Before the keyword was made evergreen in Magic 2010, deathtouch was sometimes a triggered ability based on damage. See also [old blocking deathtouch](old-blocking-deathtouch).

results.name: old fight
results.description: Before Fight was keyworded in Innistrad, it was a one-then-the-other procedure spelled out in oracle text.

results.name: old lifelink
results.description: Before lifelink was keyworded in Magic 2010, it was a triggered ability.

results.name: old mana burn clause
results.description: "Mana Burn" was a removed rule that made you lose life upon losing unspent mana. Older cards that gave you mana sometimes had clauses to prevent this.

results.name: old prahv
results.description: The old city of the Azorius guild in Ravnica.

results.name: old typeline
results.description: Cards that intentionally bring back the old typelines after they were changed for the sake of nostalgia and/or humor. Commonly used for the "Summon" typelines over creatures

results.name: old ward
results.description: "When this gets targeted by a spell/ability an opponent controls, counter it unless they do X". Would probably be replaced by the ward ability now.

results.name: olexo
results.description: One of Kytheon's Irregulars, depicted first on the left on the card of the same name.

results.name: oliphaunt
results.description: Large elephant like creatures from The Lord of the Rings

results.name: omenpath
results.description: Portal between different planes, created during/after the New Phyrexian invasion of the multiverse.

results.name: omenport
results.description: A town in Thunder Junction where Omenpaths are especially common and the architecture often features motifs evoking the shapes and colors of an Omenpath.

results.name: omnath (phyrexian)
results.description: Omnath, compleated.

results.name: ondu
results.description: A continent of Zendikar

results.name: one-off
results.description: Card art that have only been on one singular physical card. This tag is not for card art that only has been used once.

results.name: one-off
results.description: These are cards that have only one known printing of them, as a one-off celebration card. This tag isn't for specific one-off printings, only mechanically unique cards.

results.name: one-sided fight
results.description: A creature deals damage equal to its power to another. Like Fight, but without the chance to fight back. See also [fling](/tags/card/fling) which involves sacrificing the creature.

results.name: onomatopoeia
results.description: Boom! Crash! Kapow!
